title: Artifact provider scheme schema
description: Meta-schema for the declarative per-scheme schema.json found at <plugin>/artifact-providers/<scheme>/schema.json. Each scheme ships one of these files describing its fields, subcommand surface, and graph relations. Backends conform to the scheme's schema.

scheme.description: Artifact scheme name. Must match the provider directory name.

contract_version.description: Major contract version. Providers may reject mismatched majors.

fields.description: Named payload fields on an artifact of this scheme. Each field declares its type and whether it's required.

subcommands.description: Subcommands every backend must (or may) implement. create/get/update/list are typically required; the rest are optional unless the scheme needs them.

in.description: Expected input field names (from the scheme's fields or generic like uri/filter/patch).

relations.description: For the edges subcommand: supported relation names.

composition.description: Optional: declares which edge relations count as parent-to-child composition for this scheme. Defaults to [composed_of].
